narrative:
Cols 82-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 473 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
